title: Karadimas
description: A modern website for a bath and tiles shop in Glyfada, Greece. Built with Astro and Tailwind, with Cloudinary-hosted imagery.
features: Product categories: bath fixtures, tiles, and showroom highlights.
Image carousels powered by Flowbite for completed projects.
Images hosted on Cloudinary for optimized delivery.
Contact form via Formspree for lead capture.
Statically generated for fast load times and strong SEO.
